prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns for large-cap healthcare stocks like Elevance Health (ELV), I applied a 20-day forecast using historical volatility assumptions of approximately 25-30% annualized. The point estimate assumes minimal drift from current price with slight upward bias typical of healthcare sector trends. Confidence intervals widen progressively using standard normal distribution multipliers (0.674, 1.282, 1.645) applied to estimated 20-day standard deviation of approximately $12-15 based on typical daily volatility of 1.5-2%.
